title: NICI soft toy bear with heart 18cm - light brown - Fluffy plush, cute to cuddle and play with, for children & adults, great gift idea - 61559
features: HEARTFELT GREETING: The adorable light brown plush bear holds a bright red plush heart – a symbol of love!
FEELINGS MESSENGER: Perfect for Mother's Day, Father's Day, or Children's Day. The NICI bear expresses your feelings sweetly
MOTHER’s DAY: With our two new fluffy plush bears holding a heart, you can now give lots of love and joy
IDEAL FOR GIFTING: Our plush toys and cuddly products make the perfect gift for birthdays, christenings, Easter, Christmas, and more – creating unforgettable moments of joy and soft hugs

WITH LOVE, NICI: For almost 40 years, NICI has been bringing smiles to children's faces. Each product is crafted with love and attention to detail, using high-quality materials to provide comfort and joy while cuddling
